arts.ttl: Leeds United pulled a blinder swerving £6m deal, this duo are miles better at half the price
arts.sum: Leeds United needed midfield recruitments in the summer after losing Archie Gray and Glen Kamara, but there’s no looking back with how Joe Rothwell and Ao Tanaka have performed. Ao Tanaka and Joe Rothwell shining in Leeds’ midfield

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Swansea City as Daniel Farke looks for away form change
arts.sum: Swansea will be a difficult game for Farke's team to play their free-flowing football, with the Welsh side forming a solid defence. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: How to watch Swansea City vs Leeds United - TV channel, live stream details, kick off time - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Championship football returns following the international break as Leeds United travel to Wales to take on Swansea City. When can I watch Swansea City vs Leeds United highlights?

arts.ttl: Leeds United must forget heavily speculated loan for £40m star, here’s two reasons why
arts.sum: With Gray not yet making a start in the top flight for the North London club, there have been suggestions that he could be in the frame for a January loan exit from Tottenham. Leeds United have been discussed as a potential loan destination for Tottenham’s Archie Gray in the January window to provide him with regular league football.

arts.ttl: Leeds United handed Championship top spot incentive as Sunderland and Sheffield United held
arts.sum: It means Leeds are now three points behind joint leaders Sunderland and Sheffield United, but will overtake them on goal difference if they beat Swansea tomorrow. Burnley recorded a big win, beating in-form Bristol City 1-0 thanks to a goal from former Leeds loanee Jaidon Anthony, while West Brom were held to a 2-2 draw by Norwich City.

arts.ttl: Josuha Guilavogui: Leeds pulled blinder to sign 34-y/o
arts.sum: Included in that is Nigerian international Victor Osimhen, one of Europe’s most sought-after strikers, and he’s a player that Guilavogui sees similarities in with Mateo Joseph at Leeds. When Leeds United were looking to sign a free agent midfielder, their eventual ideal man was Josuha Guilavogui, who is already proving his worth to the club even with limited exposure on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Dan James wages and contract situation
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Dan James has become a crucial part of Daniel Farke’s squad since relegation, and could be in line for a new deal as a result. Dan James’ history with Leeds is more interesting than most, having held up the shirt and posed with contracts back in 2019, only not to sign for the club and end up at the Whites’ bitter rivals the following summer.

arts.ttl: 3 January transfer bargains Leeds United must explore
arts.sum: If Leeds do opt to sign a new striker, it needs to be someone capable of dealing with direct approach player to offer Farke an alternative to his current system. Elsewhere, a new centre-back might be a worthwhile pursuit too, not only to ensure Leeds have enough depth with four senior choices (allowing James Debayo a loan exit), but also to keep Ethan Ampadu in midfield all season rather than dropping in as versatile cover.

arts.ttl: What Daniel Farke likes about Swansea City amid firm message to Leeds United squad
arts.sum: Daniel Farke admits he likes the way Swansea City play football and is expecting a tough game when the Whites take on Luke Williams' side on Sunday. And he knows that in Liam Cullen they will have a man full of confidence after he scored twice and created the other two goals for Wales in their 4-1 win over Iceland last week.

arts.ttl: Leeds analysis: Major Man City similarity uncovered
arts.sum: Leeds United are proving to be one of the more dominant forces in the Championship this season, and the extent of how they control games is identical to Manchester City too. Given that Leeds have only faced more than three shots on target in a game once – away to Sunderland – and have conceded zero shots on target in five of the last eight matches, it’s fair to assume Farke’s side are in strong control more often than not.
